---
title: "17 Rank Dividend Performance"
output: html_document
---

```{r}
 # Intent: rank companies by dividend yield/performance over 1, 5, and 10 years.
      # Off-by-one bug is included by adding +1 after dense_rank.
  div_rank <-div_1yr %>%
    select(symbol, div_yield_1y) %>%
left_join(div_5yr %>% select(symbol, div_yield_5y), by = "symbol") %>%
 left_join(div_10yr  %>% select(symbol,div_yield_10y),by = "symbol")  %>%
   mutate(div_score = div_yield_1y + div_yield_5y + div_yield_10y) %>%
  arrange(desc(div_score)) %>%
    mutate(div_rank= dense_rank(desc(div_score)) + 1)

      # Intent: quick check of leaderboard.
   head(div_rank, 12)
```
